Title: ## Cell surface entry
Spike receptor-binding domain binds ACE2 at plasma membrane
TMPRSS2 primes Spike S2 domain for membrane fusion at plasma membrane
Spike S2-mediated fusion at plasma membrane releases viral genomic RNA into cytosol
## Endosomal entry
SARS-CoV-2:ACE2 complex undergoes endocytosis
Cathepsin B and L prime Spike in endosome for membrane fusion
Input: SARS-CoV-2:ACE2 complex [endosome lumen] | cathepsin B [endosome lumen] | cathepsin L [endosome lumen]
Catalyst: cathepsin B [endosome lumen] | cathepsin L [endosome lumen]

Title: Spike S2-mediated fusion at endosomal membrane releases viral genomic RNA into cytosol
## Genome translation and polyprotein processing
Ribosomes translate ORF1a from +ssRNA genome to produce polyprotein pp1a
Ribosomal -1 frameshift at ORF1a/ORF1b junction produces extended polyprotein pp1ab
PLpro within nsp3 cleaves pp1a and pp1ab to release nsp1 through nsp4
Mpro within nsp5 cleaves pp1a and pp1ab to release nsp5 through nsp16
Output: nsp5 [cytosol] | nsp6 [cytosol] | nsp7 [cytosol] | nsp8 [cytosol] | nsp9 [cytosol] | nsp10 [cytosol] | nsp12 [cytosol] | nsp13 [cytosol] | nsp14 [cytosol] | nsp15 [cytosol] | nsp16 [cytosol]

Title: nsp1 binds 40S ribosomal subunit mRNA entry channel to inhibit host translation
nsp1 promotes degradation of host mRNAs to suppress innate immune gene expression
## Replication organelle biogenesis
nsp3, nsp4 and nsp6 remodel ER-derived membranes to form double-membrane vesicles (DMVs)
Input: nsp3 [cytosol] | nsp4 [cytosol] | nsp6 [cytosol] | ER membrane [endoplasmic reticulum membrane]

Title: nsp3 assembles into a molecular pore spanning the DMV double membrane
Translocation of +ssRNA genome from cytosol into DMV interior (transporter unknown)
## RNA synthesis
nsp12:nsp7:nsp8 replicase complex synthesizes full-length negative-sense genomic RNA from positive-sense template
nsp12:nsp7:nsp8 replicase complex synthesizes new positive-sense genomic RNA from negative-sense template
Discontinuous negative-strand RNA synthesis via TRS-body to TRS-leader template switch produces negative-sense subgenomic RNAs
nsp12:nsp7:nsp8 replicase complex synthesizes positive-sense subgenomic mRNAs from negative-sense subgenomic RNA templates
nsp14 ExoN 3' to 5' exoribonuclease removes misincorporated nucleotides from nascent RNA for proofreading
Translocation of +ssRNA genome from DMV interior to cytosol via nsp3 pore
Translocation of sg mRNAs from DMV interior to cytosol via nsp3 pore
## RNA capping
nsp13 RNA 5'-triphosphatase removes gamma-phosphate from 5' end of viral RNA
(Unknown step: guanylyltransferase adds GMP to 5'-diphosphate RNA — enzyme not identified in coronaviruses)
nsp14 N7-methyltransferase methylates GpppN cap to produce m7GpppN cap-0
nsp16 ribose 2'-O-methyltransferase with nsp10 cofactor converts cap-0 to cap-1 to evade MDA5 innate immune sensing
## Structural protein translation and virion assembly
Ribosomes translate sg mRNAs and co-translationally insert S, E and M proteins into ER membrane
Output: S protein [endoplasmic reticulum membrane] | E protein [endoplasmic reticulum membrane] | M protein [endoplasmic reticulum membrane]

Title: Ribosomes translate N protein sg mRNA in cytosol
Ribosomes translate accessory protein sg mRNAs to produce ORF3a, ORF6, ORF7a, ORF7b and ORF8 proteins
Output: ORF3a protein [cytosol] | ORF6 protein [cytosol] | ORF7a protein [cytosol] | ORF7b protein [cytosol] | ORF8 protein [cytosol]

Title: Translocation of S, E and M proteins from ER membrane to ERGIC membrane
Input: S protein [endoplasmic reticulum membrane] | E protein [endoplasmic reticulum membrane] | M protein [endoplasmic reticulum membrane]
Output: S protein [ERGIC membrane] | E protein [ERGIC membrane] | M protein [ERGIC membrane]

Title: Furin cleaves SARS-CoV-2 Spike at polybasic S1/S2 cleavage site (PRRAR) during transit through trans-Golgi network
N protein encapsidates newly synthesized +ssRNA genome to form nucleocapsid
Virion assembly and budding at ERGIC incorporates nucleocapsid into enveloped particle
Input: furin-cleaved S1:S2 Spike protein [ERGIC membrane] | E protein [ERGIC membrane] | M protein [ERGIC membrane] | N protein:+ssRNA nucleocapsid [cytosol]

Title: Assembled virions traffic via lysosomal pathway for egress from infected cell
Exocytosis releases SARS-CoV-2 virions from lysosome to extracellular space
## Immune evasion
LY6E inhibits Spike-mediated membrane fusion and restricts coronavirus entry
Neuropilin-1 facilitates SARS-CoV-2 attachment and cell entry
PLpro removes ubiquitin from ubiquitinated host innate immune signaling proteins
Input: ubiquitinated host innate immune signaling protein [cytosol]
Output: deubiquitinated host innate immune signaling protein [cytosol] | ubiquitin [cytosol]

Title: nsp3 macrodomain removes ADP-ribose from PARP-modified host proteins to prevent PARP-mediated inhibition of viral replication
nsp15 EndoU cleaves dsRNA replication intermediates to evade cytosolic innate immune sensing
ORF8 protein mediates downregulation and lysosomal degradation of MHC-I to suppress antigen presentation
